title: Sort Configuration Manifest
description: Defines the hierarchical display order for content in the portfolio.

agent_studio.description: Ordered list of agent filename stems (e.g., 'BMadMethod') for the first column.

projects.description: Global sort order for project slugs. Controls Filter Bar order and Blueprint group stacking.

build_lab.description: Ordered list of project slugs to sort Prototype cards in the third column.

blueprints.description: Collection of ordered lists for documents inside each project.

additionalProperties.description: Ordered list of document filename stems (e.g., 'prd', 'architecture').
